emails.subject: Project deadline extended
emails.body: Hey, the deadline for the AI project has been extended to next Friday. Please update your tasks accordingly.

emails.subject: Family dinner this Sunday
emails.body: Don't forget family dinner this Sunday at 7pm. Your cousin is visiting from Mumbai.

emails.subject: Performance review scheduled
emails.body: Your performance review is scheduled for next Monday at 10am. Please prepare your self assessment.

notes.title: Book recommendation
notes.content: Read Atomic Habits — great for building consistency

notes.title: Feeling overwhelmed
notes.content: Too many deadlines at once. Feeling anxious about performance review. Need to manage time better.
